meta.note: Links-only scaffold, plus per-LGA 'nation' entries for 103 of NSW's 128 LGAs, each seeded from that council's own published Acknowledgement of Country (quoted or drafted + cited per entry) — never invented or inferred. All entries were reviewed and confirmed by the project owner on 2026-06-22; see each entry's sourcedBy field for how it was originally researched. The remaining 25 LGAs were deliberately left without an entry — live contested-naming disputes, no primary council citation found, or large amalgamated areas with no single unified statement — and fall back to the statewide links plus a 'No verified reference yet' marker, never a guess.

nation.value: Indicative only — identify Country via the AIATSIS map and the relevant Local Aboriginal Land Council.

links.text: Find your Local Aboriginal Land Council
NSW Aboriginal Heritage Information Management System (AHIMS)
BoM Indigenous Weather Knowledge — seasonal calendars

SYDNEY.nation: Gadigal people of the Eora Nation

nationLinks.text: “We acknowledge the Gadigal of the Eora nation as the Traditional Custodians of our local area.” — City of Sydney
